# Self-Host Guide
> Practical tutorials for building and managing your own homelab. Covers Docker, Linux, web services, networking, security, and automation.

## About
Self-Host Guide provides hands-on tutorials for developers and IT professionals who want to self-host their own services. All content is based on real experience and tested configurations.

## Articles
- Hermes Agent Complete Setup Guide (2026): articles/hermes-agent-setup.html
- WSL2 Ultimate Productivity Environment Setup: articles/wsl-setup.html  
- Docker Compose for Self-Hosting: articles/docker-compose-guide.html
- Cloudflare Tunnel: Free & Secure Way to Expose Services: articles/cloudflare-tunnel-guide.html
- Nginx Reverse Proxy Setup Guide: articles/nginx-reverse-proxy-guide.html
- How to Set Up Your Own VPN with WireGuard: articles/wireguard-vpn-guide.html
- Monitoring Your Homelab with Prometheus and Grafana: articles/monitoring-homelab-guide.html
- Automatic Backup Strategies for Self-Hosted Services: articles/backup-strategies-guide.html
- Securing Your Self-Hosted Server: A Practical Guide: articles/server-security-guide.html
- Self-Hosted Password Manager with Vaultwarden: articles/vaultwarden-password-manager.html
- Docker Networking Explained for Beginners: articles/docker-networking-guide.html
- Introduction to Ansible for Homelab Automation: articles/ansible-homelab-guide.html
- How to Set Up a Personal Wiki with BookStack: articles/bookstack-wiki-guide.html
- Linux Server Disk Cleanup Practical Guide: articles/linux-disk-cleanup.html
- FastAPI Project: From Development to Deployment: articles/fastapi-deploy.html

## Core Topics
Docker, Linux, Networking, Security, Backup, Monitoring, Automation, VPN, Web Services, Self-Hosting
